title: General Caster - is it down?  Unable to connect, getting 404 error
excerpt: Is anyone else having issues using General Caster since 10am US Central Time?  Getting 500 or 404 errors.

posts.author: udayrao (Uday Rao)
posts.cookedHtml: Is anyone else having issues using General Caster since 10am US Central Time? Getting 500 or 404 errors.

posts.author: gwalsh (Grainne Walsh)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the same problem at the moment, not sure how long it’s been going on for, but can’t add new automations, current ones are showing as in progress but not completing. Gateway timeout from https://generalcaster.app/ but https://generalcaster1.statuspage.io/ is claiming everything is fine

posts.author: DaniAlterio (Dani Asti)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having the same issues on my end

posts.author: stevenjhammond (Steve Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: Me too, getting a 504 error and things are timing out when trying to add new automations.
